title: soldanella chrysosticta subsp. pelia
intro: Soldanella chrysosticta subsp. pelia, commonly known as Golden Betony, is a flowering plant species within the Primulaceae family, native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. Traditionally, Golden Betony has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as indigestion and nausea, due to its antispasmodic and carminative effects. The health benefits of Golden Betony include reducing inflammation, relieving anxiety and stress, and promoting a good night's sleep. Herbal preparations of Golden Betony can be consumed as teas, tinctures, or capsules, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine.
